message:
feat(tui): wrap all 14 screens in panic-catching error boundaries (br-2nmed)

Uses std::panic::catch_unwind at the three screen dispatch points
(view, update, tick) to catch panics from any screen. When a screen
panics, a fallback error UI shows the screen name, error message,
and recovery hint. Press 'r' to recreate the screen fresh; other
screens remain unaffected. The screen_panics map uses RefCell for
interior mutability in the immutable view() context.

Adds 10 tests: 7 error boundary scenarios + 3 panic_payload_to_string
unit tests. All 180 tui_app tests pass (170 existing + 10 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
